subject: GO route: commit Slice B exact bundle
body: Controller GO for Nebulous Slice B commit window. Torrid gave read-only GO, Slice A landed as 2791be3c, active queue is clear, and no staged files are present. Please open a short git:index/head claim, enqueue an exact commit intent, stage only these paths, verify staged exactly, commit, complete the queue entry, close your Slice B claim, then report residue. Exact Slice B paths: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts; agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Suggested subject: feat(agent-tools): harden p8 tui interactions. Do not include coordination residue or already-landed Slice A files. Do not claim P8-A2 complete or P8 complete.
